calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-30-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Plaintiff Jean Claude Lair was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Kurt Von Bauler, sued as Kurt Van Bauler.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on November 4, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Jean Claude Lair, and against defendant Kurt Von Bauler, sued as Kurt Van Bauler as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $2,245.70.
Total - $2,245.70.

Additionally, plaintiff Andrew Lambert is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1388 California Street, Room 415, San Francisco, CA 94109. The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-30-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-25-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk F. Green/ N. Bautista; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Jean Claude Lair appeared in pro per.
The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there are no appearances by the defendant.
The trial date of Nov. 30, 2009 remains on calendar.
TRIAL DATE REMAINS.
